gameContext.customOverride:
Output ONE token: UP|DOWN|LEFT|RIGHT|WAIT
Scoring: water hit by crate (+1), gate (+4), collect chip (+1), collect boots (+3), reddoor (+2), greendoor (+2), bluedoor (+2), yellowdoor (+2), kill exit (+5). Win: clear all exit. Lose: die. Mechanics: push crate, collect chip, collect key, collect boots.
